items.content: Asked for hand-thrown ceramics for a slower morning routine
Asked what goes well with the pour-over set
Asked for linen pieces that soften over seasons
Filed a damaged return for the Wabi-Sabi Bowl
Home + slow craft - ceramics, linen throws, stoneware

episodic.label: Episodic - Aurora
episodic.caveat: Theo's customer_episodic_seed has one curated summary today; the rest of the per-customer story lives in pellier.orders + pellier.returns. Production episodic recall would derive both. The fixture below previews that derived shape.

items.content: Builds rituals around morning coffee and quiet table moments
Bought Stoneware Pour-Over Set ($148) 22 days ago
Bought Wabi-Sabi Bowl ($64) 9 days ago - filed damaged return today
Bought Linen Throw, Oat ($118) 47 days ago

procedural.label: Procedural - Aurora
procedural.caveat: tool_audit records every ALLOWed tool call - reads and writes - so this aggregate covers the full per-tool signal in real time. Theo's process_return shows up alongside reads like find_pieces and whats_trending. Intent / persona_id / success columns are the next ticket; once they land the aggregate becomes 'which tool wins for which intent at which latency, per persona'.
